Pricing

Honest pricing for serious training

Coaching education is an investment in a career that can last decades. We set our prices plainly, with no hidden fees, because you deserve to know exactly what you are committing to before you begin.

The Mastery Pathway

Level & CredentialFormat & HoursDurationPrice (INR, excl. GST)
Level 1: Catalyst
(ICI-C)
Online, one-to-one.
36 hours: 12 coaching + 24 self-work.
Up to 3 months₹2,15,000Enrol
Level 2: Architect
(ICI-A)
Online, one-to-one.
60 hours: 20 coaching + 40 self-work.
Up to 4 months₹3,45,000Enrol
Level 3: Sage
(ICI-S)
Online, one-to-one.
90 hours: 30 coaching + 60 self-work.
Up to 6 months₹4,95,000Enrol
Level 4: Luminary
(ICI-L)
Online, one-to-one.
120 hours: 40 live + 80 self-work and capstone.
Up to 12 months₹6,95,000Enrol

Scroll horizontally to see full table →

What every price includes

  • One-to-one coaching with an experienced faculty coach
  • All course materials and guided self-work
  • Assessment on real coaching, not attendance
  • Your ICI credential and post-nominals for life
  • Membership of the ICI coaching community

How enrolment works

  1. 1
    Choose your level, or take the free assessment if you are unsure.
  2. 2
    Speak with an advisor to confirm the right fit and answer your questions.
  3. 3
    Confirm your place and complete enrolment, in full or by instalments.
  4. 4
    Get matched with your coach and begin within 7 working days.

Payment options

Pay in full or by instalments. We will confirm the options available for your level when you speak with an advisor.

GST and international clients

All prices are exclusive of GST. Applicable taxes will be added at checkout.

Frequently asked questions

Ready to begin your journey?

Choose your level Take the free assessment

The International Coaching Institute trains and certifies coaches one-to-one, online, blending coaching craft with leadership, psychology, neuroscience and human behaviour. Become the coach people trust.
